cases.prompt:

files.content: # missing on disk fixture for hooks/zoto-eval-session-start.mjs

cases.expected_output: Exit status 0; hook script zoto-eval-session-start.mjs completed without prompting.
assertions: sessionStart hook entry ran the configured script without unresolved needs_user_input
No askQuestion emitted from hook binaries — stdin/stdout hooks channel only
Behaviour matched hooks.json description excerpt: Eval System: nudge on stale runs, missing evals.json, or detected drift

primitive_analysis.summary: The sessionStart hook runs `node hooks/zoto-eval-session-start.mjs` and prints either `{}` or JSON carrying `additional_context` when configured eval state exposes stale run folders, skills without `evals/evals.json`, or a drift reminder tied to `manifest.yml` and the once-per-day marker.
